description: Taskrabbit is a platform for booking local delivery and home services. Its developer hub documents partner integrations for Dolly delivery operations and Taskrabbit home-services booking workflows.
summary: Taskrabbit exposes two documented HTTP APIs in its developer hub—a Delivery by Dolly REST API using OAuth 2.0 client-credentials bearer tokens and a Taskrabbit Home Services partner API using a partner-issued API key—plus a known MCP server at https://mcp.taskrabbit.com/mcp whose auth is not publicly documented.
